rows.label: qev030907_MSG0001
rows.name:
...The shawl I was making for Grandpa
Aldo... I didn't finish it in time, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030907_MSG0002
rows.name:
Sniff... At the wedding, he gave me
Grandma's earrings as a keepsake. So I
wanted to... thank him for that, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030907_MSG0003
rows.name:
I heard Aldo-san was smiling very happily
when he passed away, na. He must surely
have gone without regrets, ne... [ST:wait ]
